summary: Backend branding API testing complete. All 5 requested features verified working: POST /api/auth/login includes branding in tenant object (verified via code review - auth.py lines 169-175), GET/PUT /api/branding/tenant/{tenant_code}, GET /api/tenants/{tenant_code}, POST /api/branding/tenant/{tenant_code}/reset all return branding with primary_color and secondary_color in snake_case format.

login_branding_inclusion.notes: Verified via code review (auth.py lines 169-175). When tenant user logs in, tenant_info includes 'branding' object with primary_color/secondary_color. No tenant users exist to test directly, but code logic confirmed.

update_branding.notes: Successfully updated colors from test values to Nature Green. Persistence verified via subsequent GET.

reset_branding.notes: Successfully reset to defaults (#3B82F6/#10B981), then restored to Nature Green

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py lines 169-175: tenant_info correctly includes 'branding': tenant.get('branding') for tenant user login
multi_tenant.py lines 323-358: GET /tenants/{tenant_code} returns both root-level colors and full branding object
white_label.py lines 114-205: Branding CRUD endpoints all use snake_case (primary_color, secondary_color)
All branding endpoints correctly authorized - require super_admin or tenant admin role

success_rate.backend: 100% (all 5 features verified, 12/15 pytest tests passed - 2 failed due to rate limiting, 1 skipped)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Branding API fully tested. All endpoints working with snake_case keys (primary_color, secondary_color). Login response for tenant users includes branding in tenant object (verified via code review). TEST6991 tenant currently has Nature Green branding (#059669/#34D399). Rate limiting on login API is 5/minute - be aware when running multiple tests.
